issues.description: SearchDeck filter is inverted: uses maxCost=4 but text says 'cost of 4 or more' (minCost=4)
Missing lookCount parameter: text says 'Look at 4 cards from the top' but DSL doesn't specify looking at 4 cards
Missing revealCount parameter: text says 'reveal up to 1 card' but DSL doesn't specify the reveal limit
Missing bottomDeckRest parameter: text says 'place the rest at the bottom of your deck in any order' which should be encoded
